query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS grant_applications (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  opportunity_id INT NOT NULL,
  application_name VARCHAR(255),
  status ENUM('not_started', 'drafting', 'review', 'submitted', 'under_review', 'awarded', 'rejected', 'withdrawn') DEFAULT 'not_started',
  submitted_date DATE,
  requested_amount DECIMAL(12,2),
  awarded_amount DECIMAL(12,2),
  project_title VARCHAR(255),
  project_description TEXT,
  project_start_date DATE,
  project_end_date DATE,
  assigned_to VARCHAR(255),
  submission_method ENUM('online', 'email', 'mail', 'portal') DEFAULT 'online',
  confirmation_number VARCHAR(100),
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (opportunity_id) REFERENCES grant_opportunities(id)
);

  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (opportunity_id) REFERENCES grant_opportunities(id)
);
